title: centaurium mairei
intro: Centaurium mairei, also known as Mountain Bladderwort or Maire's Centaury, is a perennial plant species in the Gentianaceae family. The plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for treating urinary issues and as a diuretic. Centaurium mairei is valued for its ability to reduce inflammation, relieve symptoms of menopause, and support the health of the urinary tract. Herbal preparations of Centaurium mairei can be found in teas, tinctures, and infusions, and are often used to promote overall health and well-being.
